title: EB and CC have updates - Update button, Release notes and Poly Lens links are available
scenario: Verify that when both Earbuds and Charge Case have updates available, the Update button navigates to Device Settings with Software Update tab expanded, showing correct update options and links for each device.
steps: Ensure both Earbuds (EB) and Charge Case (CC) have updates available.
Observe the device home screen shows an Update button.
Verify navigation to Device Settings with the Software Update tab expanded.
Observe the Earbuds section shows an Update button with a '1' tag on the settings tab.
Observe the Charge Case section displays info about needing Poly Lens Desktop and 'Update Available'.
Verify the Release Notes link (for Earbuds) is present.
Verify the Poly Lens App link (for Charge Case) is present.
Verify it opens the firmware release notes page.
Tap the Poly Lens App link.
Verify it opens the Poly Lens App page.
expected: The device home screen shows an Update button. Tapping it navigates to Device Settings with the Software Update tab expanded. Earbuds show an Update button with a "1" tag. Charge Case shows info about needing Poly Lens Desktop and "Update Available". Release Notes link opens the firmware release notes page. Poly Lens App link opens the Poly Lens App page.
